function.message: I could not complete this inbox item because one required source file is missing: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_03_11__eur_000029__bill__repair_ledger_filter_order.md` (with leading underscore). I verified only `50_finance/purchases/2026_03_11__eur_000029__bill__repair_ledger_filter_order.md` exists. Please confirm whether the underscored path is a typo or provide the correct 5th file.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied process-next-inbox-item workflow and inbox lane rule: stop without mutation when request is blocked on missing canonical support; do not complete partial set.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly requires OCR of five listed files. One listed path does not exist (`.../_2026_03_11...`). After an additional targeted lookup in `50_finance/purchases`, only the non-underscored variant was found. Completing only four of five would be a partial result requiring guesswork about intended input.
